title: Verify discount offer appears when user persists in canceling
description: Test that if user continues to cancel after loss aversion gate, a discount offer popup appears with backend-controlled pricing
preconditions: User clicked Cancel and passed loss aversion gate

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial

expected_result: Offer popup appears with 'Lock in 50% off your first month now' or similar backend-controlled offer, displays discounted price, shows trust clause about paid subscription starting after trial ends
